# Developer Students Club — DSC SRM IST Ramapuram

> DSC (Developer Students Club) SRM IST Ramapuram is a student-driven technical club affiliated with Google Developers on Campus at SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Ramapuram campus, Chennai.

## About

DSC SRM IST Ramapuram empowers student developers through hands-on workshops, collaborative projects, hackathons, and networking events. We bridge the gap between academic learning and industry-ready skills.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Club overview, mission, and upcoming events
- [About](/about): Club history, vision, and domain areas
- [Team](/team): Core team members and their roles
- [Gallery](/gallery): Event photos and highlights
- [Contact](/contact): Location and contact information

## Contact

- Address: SRM IST Ramapuram, Chennai, TN, India
- Social: @dscsrmrmp on X (Twitter), Instagram, LinkedIn

## Technology

Built with Astro, React, TypeScript, and deployed as a static site.
